title: UX Behavior Trait metadata
description: Frontmatter for a behavior trait — a reusable, cross-cutting interaction contract (dismiss, focus-trap, anchored positioning, roving focus, typeahead) that many specs share instead of re-describing it each time.

id.description: Unique kebab-case slug; must match the filename.

keys.description: Keyboard keys an spec must support to legitimately claim this trait. Checked against each spec's API a11y.keyboard.

match.description: Whether an spec must declare all of `keys` or at least one.
